initial_dialogue_state_list: You want to have a special birthday cake prepared at the restaurant 'curry king' for your party at 16:00 on Saturday.
You want to request a room with a sea view at the hotel in the north with a moderate price range for 2 people for 4 nights starting from Saturday.
You want to arrange for a personal chef to cook special dietary meals at the hotel for the duration of your 4-night stay starting from Saturday.
